failedAssertions.reason: Empty agent messages still fall back to raw JSON text instead of being suppressed.
Relay-unreachable bot commands surface the raw `fetch failed` message instead of a clearer user-facing relay-down error.
Post-detach agent output stopped reaching Feishu, but the relay history did not retain the post-detach delta.
The disconnect/reconnect flow never notified the attached user that the wrapper disconnected.
SIGTERM shutdown was not graceful: the server required SIGKILL and the attached bot user received no shutdown notification.
